introSection: Montanha de Moco (Portuguese for Moco Mountain) is a steel roller coaster located at Ulengo Center Glakeni in Luanda, Luanda, Angola. It opened with the opening of the Ulengo Center Glakeni on 22 July 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It has single helix layout and is painted with orange track and blue supports.

fullText:
Montanha de Moco (Portuguese for Moco Mountain) is a steel roller coaster located at Ulengo Center Glakeni in Luanda, Luanda, Angola. It opened with the opening of the Ulengo Center Glakeni on 22 July 2015.

It has single helix layout and is painted with orange track and blue supports.
